name: Avery Brooks
resume_text:
Avery Brooks
Email: avery.brooks.eval@example.com
Financial Analyst, Cedar Metrics, 2021-2025
Maintained department budget trackers in Excel, prepared monthly variance commentary for software spend and headcount costs, and refreshed forecast inputs for quarterly planning. Partnered with engineering and marketing budget owners to explain drivers behind actuals versus plan. Built a subscription revenue tab using ARR, churn, and expansion assumptions.
Accounting Assistant, Cedar Metrics, 2019-2021
Reconciled vendor invoices and supported month-end close schedules.
Skills: Excel modeling, variance analysis, forecasting, ARR metrics, stakeholder reporting.
human_notes: Strong finance analyst match; interview should validate model rigor and business explanation.
